name: Longevity Medicine
what: Longevity medicine focuses on extending human lifespan through a combination of advanced therapies, regenerative technologies, and lifestyle interventions. This field aims to address age-related diseases and improve overall health in older populations.

name: Precision Oncology (Liquid Biopsies)
what: Precision oncology uses liquid biopsies to detect and monitor cancer through the analysis of circulating tumor cells and DNA. This technology aims to improve early detection, personalized treatment plans, and real-time monitoring of disease progression.

name: Post-Biological Civilisation
what: A post-biological civilisation refers to a future where biological life is no longer the dominant form of intelligence. This concept explores the transition towards artificial and digital forms of consciousness, potentially leading to new societal structures.

name: Dyson Swarm Milestone Roadmap
what: The Dyson Swarm is a proposed megastructure consisting of trillions of solar panels in orbit around the Earth. This technology aims to provide clean, sustainable energy by capturing and converting sunlight into usable power.

name: RAG Pipelines
what: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines combine the strengths of retrieval-based and generative models to improve the accuracy and efficiency of text generation tasks. This technology is crucial for applications requiring context-aware responses.

name: On-Device AI
what: On-device AI refers to the development of AI models that can run on edge devices, such as smartphones and IoT sensors. This technology aims to reduce latency, improve privacy, and enhance real-time decision-making capabilities.

name: Stellar Engineering
what: Theoretical and speculative exploration of engineering stars for energy production.

name: AlphaFold
what: AI-driven protein structure prediction tool with applications in drug discovery.

name: Grid Optimisation AI
what: AI-driven systems for optimizing power grid operations and efficiency.

name: Fusion Plasma Control AI
what: AI systems for controlling and optimizing fusion plasma conditions in tokamaks.

name: Battery Chemistry AI
what: AI-driven advancements in battery technology for energy storage.

name: Regulatory AI
what: AI systems for automating regulatory processes and ensuring compliance.

name: Compliance Automation
what: Automated systems for ensuring regulatory compliance in various industries.

name: Policy Generation
what: AI-driven systems for creating and optimizing public policies.

name: Quantum Machine Learning
what: Combining quantum computing with machine learning to solve complex problems.

name: Climate Change Mitigation Strategies
what: Strategies and technologies for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and combating climate change.

name: Ethical AI Deployment Frameworks
what: Guidelines for ensuring ethical deployment of artificial intelligence systems.

name: Digital Physics
what: Theoretical framework that suggests the universe is fundamentally digital in nature.

name: Simulation Theory Implications for Technology
what: Exploring the implications of simulation theory on future technological advancements.

name: Longevity Medicine (Bryan Johnson/Altos Labs)
what: Research and development in extending human lifespan through biotechnological means.

name: Ocean Thermal Energy Conversion (OTEC)
what: Harnessing the temperature difference between deep and surface ocean waters for power generation.

name: Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS)
what: Advanced geothermal technologies for harnessing underground heat.

name: MAX Phase Ceramics
what: High-temperature resistant ceramics with potential applications in aerospace and energy systems.

name: Topological Insulators
what: Materials that conduct electricity on their surface but not in their interior, with potential applications in quantum computing and electronics.
source: University of California, Berkeley · MIT · IBM Research

name: 4D Printing Materials
what: 4D printing materials can change their shape over time, offering new possibilities in adaptive structures and self-assembly.

name: Programmable Matter
what: Programmable matter can change its shape and properties in response to external stimuli, opening new possibilities for adaptive materials.

name: Silicene (2D Material)
what: Silicene is a 2D material with unique electronic properties, potentially revolutionizing the field of nanoelectronics.

name: Borophene (2D Material)
what: Borophene is a 2D material with exceptional electronic and mechanical properties, offering new possibilities in nanotechnology.

name: Space-Based Solar Power
what: Space-based solar power systems could provide a continuous and abundant source of clean energy, revolutionizing the global energy landscape.

name: Nuclear Waste Transmutation
what: Transmuting nuclear waste into less hazardous materials could significantly reduce the environmental impact of nuclear energy.

name: Iron-Air Batteries
what: Iron-air batteries offer a high-energy storage solution with the potential for widespread adoption in renewable energy systems.

name: Green Ammonia
what: Green ammonia is produced using renewable energy, offering a clean and sustainable alternative to traditional fossil fuels.

name: Enhanced Geothermal (EGS)
what: EGS technology enhances the natural geothermal reservoirs, allowing for more efficient and widespread use of this renewable energy source.

name: mRNA Therapeutics Beyond Vaccines
what: Advanced mRNA technologies are being developed for a wide range of therapeutic applications beyond vaccines, including gene therapy and cancer treatment.

name: CAR-T 2.0
what: Next-generation CAR-T therapies are designed to be more effective and less toxic, offering improved outcomes for patients with cancer.

name: Organ-on-Chip Technology
what: Organ-on-chip technology simulates human organs in a microfluidic environment, enabling the testing of drugs and therapies with unprecedented accuracy.

name: Character AI
what: Character AI is a platform that enables the creation of realistic and interactive virtual characters, enhancing the user experience in various applications.

name: Scale AI
what: Scale AI is a platform that provides data labeling and annotation services for machine learning, enabling businesses to train more accurate models.

name: AI21 Labs
what: AI21 Labs is a leading AI research and development company that focuses on creating innovative language models with advanced capabilities.

name: Cohere
what: Cohere is a state-of-the-art natural language processing platform that offers advanced capabilities in text generation and understanding.

name: Perplexity AI
what: Perplexity AI is a cutting-edge language model that excels in generating human-like text, making it ideal for content creation and research.

name: Runway ML
what: Runway ML is an open-source platform that democratizes machine learning, allowing non-experts to create and deploy AI models easily.

name: DeepSeek
what: DeepSeek is a deep learning framework that specializes in natural language processing and text analysis, offering unparalleled accuracy and efficiency.

name: xAI
what: xAI is a novel approach to artificial intelligence that leverages advanced neural networks and quantum computing for unprecedented computational power.

name: Dyson Spheres for Energy Harvesting
what: Huge structures surrounding stars to capture energy.

name: Orbital Ring Construction
what: A massive orbital ring that provides a continuous loop of transportation around Earth.

name: Mind Uploading and Digital Afterlife
what: Technologies for uploading human consciousness to digital environments.

name: Neural Prosthetics for Augmented Reality
what: Implantable devices that integrate with the brain to enhance sensory perception.
